awesomeList.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome MySQL software, libraries, tools and resources
awesomeList.description: A curated list of awesome MySQL software, libraries, tools and resources

nodes.itemHTML: • Database Systems Lecture Notes - lecture notes on Database Systems (available in pdf, html, odt and markdown) including a Chapter on SQL that covers basic set-up, exercises and problems.
• Dumplingstars154 - Logical, parallel backup/dumper tool for MySQL/TiDB written in GoLang - support csv format output and integrated as library
• DMstars376 - A High-Availability data migration platform which supports migrating data from MySQL/MariaDB to TiDB and merging shard tables
• go-tpcstars65 - A golang port of TPCC and TPCH benchmark for MySQL.
• Skeema - Declarative pure-SQL schema management system for MySQL and MariaDB, with support for sharding and external online schema change tools
• Test databasestars2.5k - A sample MySQL database with an integrated test suite, used to test applications and servers
• OmniDB/OmniDB: Web tool for database managementstars2.4k
• Kingbusstars802 - A distributed MySQL binlog storage system built on Raft
• mysql-ripplestars340 - Ripple, a server that can serve as a middleman in MySQL replication
• mex-mariadbstars1 - MIT licensed MariaDB/MySQL Client Library for GNU Octave and Matlab.
• MySQL Explain Analyzerstars54 - A web-based analyzer of EXPLAIN FORMAT=JSON output, providing comments, scalability analysis and permalinks for saved samples.
• mysql-statsdstars99 - A Python daemon to collect information from MySQL and send it via StatsD to Graphite.
• MySQLTuner-perl - A script that allows you to review a MySQL installation quickly and make adjustments to increase performance and stability.
• Percona Monitoring and Management - An open-source platform for managing and monitoring MySQL performance.
• Prometheus/mysqld_exporterstars1.1k - Time series database for real-time monitoring and alerting.
• pstopstars179 - a top-like program for MySQL, collecting, aggregating and displaying information from performance_schema.
• MyDumperstars1.3k - Logical, parallel backup/dumper tool for MySQL
• mysql-compatibility-configstars91 - make MySQL configuration behave more like newer (or older) releases of MySQL.
• Connector/C - Official C driver for MySQL.
• Connector/CPP - Official C++ driver for MySQL.
• Connector/J - a standardized database driver for the Java platforms and development.
• Connector/Net - a standardized database driver for .Net platforms and development.
• Connector/Node.js - Official Node.js driver for MySQL.
• DBD::mysql - MySQL driver for the Perl5 Database Interface.
• libAttachSQLstars34 - libAttachSQL is a lightweight, non-blocking C API for MySQL servers.
• MariaDB Java Client - LGPL-licensed MariaDB Client Library for Java Applications.
• mysqlclient-pythonstars1.9k - (Old) MySQL database connector for Python.
• node-mysqlstars16.4k - A pure Nodejs Javascript client implementing the MySQL protocol.
• PHP mysqlnd - MySQL native driver for MySQL, deprecating older libmysql based driver.
• PyMySQLstars6.4k - MySQL database connector for Python.
• Ruby Mysql2 gemstars2.1k - MySQL driver for Ruby and Rails projects.
• MySQL Docker - Official Docker images.
• dbdeployer - A tool that installs one or more MySQL servers within seconds, easily, securely, and with full control.
• Shiftstars703 - An application that helps you run schema migrations on MySQL databases
• Adminer - Database management in a single PHP file.
• myclistars9.6k - A Terminal Client for MySQL with AutoCompletion and Syntax Highlighting.

• MySQL Shell - Advanced client and code editor for MySQL that supports development and administration for the MySQL Server and MySQL InnoDB cluster (AdminAPI) with an interactive JavaScript, Python, or SQL interface.
• Ocelot GUIstars51 - GUI client for MySQL or MariaDB, including debugger.
• Percona Monitoring and Management - An open-source platform for managing and monitoring MySQL performance.
• phpMyAdmin - a free software tool written in PHP, intended to handle the administration of MySQL over the Web.
• pspgstars1.6k - provides a pager with enhanced visualization and navigation for tabular data. Originally implemented for PostgreSQL, but also supports MySQL.
• SQLyog Community edition - SQLyog Community edition. For Windows, works fine under wine in Mac and Linux
• DBeaverstars20.5k - A cross-platform SQL and NoSQL database client.
• MHA - Master High Availability Manager and tools for MySQL.
• orchestratorstars4.1k - MySQL replication topology management and High Availability solution.
• Percona Replication Managerstars77 - Asynchronous MySQL replication manager agent for Pacemaker. Supports file and GTID based replication, geo-distributed clusters using booth.
• replication-managerstars472 - a high availability solution to manage MariaDB 10.x and MySQL & Percona Server 5.7 GTID replication topologies.
• MySQL Router - MySQL Router is part of InnoDB cluster, and is a lightweight middleware that provides transparent routing between your application and back-end MySQL Servers.
• common_schemastars109 - DBA's framework for MySQL, providing a function library, views library and QueryScript interpreter.
• sysstars764 - A collection of views, functions and procedures to help MySQL administrators get insight in to MySQL Database usage.
• Acrastars749 - SQL database protection suite: strong selective encryption, SQL injections prevention, intrusion detection system.
• TiDBstars27.7k - A distributed HTAP database compatible with the MySQL protocol.
• vitessstars11.8k - vitess provides servers and tools which facilitate scaling of MySQL databases for large scale web services.
• gh-oststars8.8k - GitHub's online schema migration for MySQL.
• openark kit - a set of utilities that solve everyday maintenance tasks, which may be complicated or time consuming to do by hand, written in Python.
• Percona Toolkit - a collection of advanced command-line tools to perform a variety of MySQL server and system tasks that are too difficult or complex to perform manually.
• UnDROP - a tool to recover data from dropped or corrupted InnoDB tables.
• Percona Live - MySQL & Openstack focused conference.
• SCALE - A community organized Linux and Open Source conference held annually in Southern California. The local MySQL community runs a track under the name MySQL Community Day.
• SQL-exercisestars861 - contains several SQL exercises, including the schema description figure, SQL code to build schema, questions and solutions in SQL. Based on wikibook SQL Exercises.
• Anemometerstars1.3k - Box SQL slow query monitor.
• innodb-rubystars952 - A parser for InnoDB file formats, in Ruby.
• innotopstars637 - a 'top' clone for MySQL with many features and flexibility.
• MySQLDumper - open-source web based backup tool - useful for shared webhosting
• Percona Xtrabackup - an open-source hot backup utility for MySQL - based servers that doesn’t lock your database during the backup.
• iibench-mysqlstars43 - Java based version of the Index Insertion Benchmark for MySQL/Percona/MariaDB.
• Sysbenchstars3.9k - a modular, cross-platform and multi-threaded benchmark tool.
• TPCC-MySQL - A port of the popular TPCC benchmark for MySQL.
• Hubot MySQL ChatOpsstars87
• Connector/Python - a standardized database driver for Python platforms and development.
• go-sql-driverstars10.8k - a lightweight and fast MySQL-Driver for Go's (golang) database/sql package.
• Flywaydb - Database migrations; Evolve your database schema easily and reliably across all your instances
• Liquibase - Source control for your database
• HeidiSQL - MySQL GUI frontend for Windows.
• MySQL Workbench - provides DBAs and developers an integrated tools environment for database design & modeling; SQL devleopment; database administration.
• SequelProstars8.3k - a Mac database management application for working with MySQL databases.
• Galera Cluster - a true Multimaster Cluster based on synchronous replication.
• MaxScalestars1.1k - open-source, database-centric proxy.
• Mixerstars708 - a MySQL proxy powered by Go which aims to supply a simple solution for MySQL sharding.
• MySQL Proxy - A simple program that sits between your client and MySQL server(s) that can monitor, analyze or transform their communication.
• ProxySQLstars22 - High performance proxy for MySQL.
• MariaDBstars3.8k - Community developed fork of MySQL server.
• MySQL Server & MySQL Clusterstars6.5k - Official Oracle's MySQL server & MySQL Cluster distribution.
• Percona Server - An enhanced, drop-in MySQL replacement.
• jetpantsstars1.1k - An automation suite for managing large range sharding clusters, by Tumblr.
• go-mysqlstars3k - A pure go library to handle MySQL network protocol and replication.
• MySQL Utilities - a collection of command-line utilities, written in Python, that are used for maintaining and administering MySQL servers, either individually, or within Replication hierarchies.
• FOSDEM - a free event for software developers to meet, share ideas and collaborate. Annually, in Brussels. Offers "MySQL & friends" room.
• MySQL Central - Oracle's annual MySQL conference, as part of Oracle Open World.
